content_body: The day we arrived it snowed and the scenery was snowy white. We explored the alpine town of Helen on day 1. We enjoyed a horseback ride and the pretty scenery. On day two we went hiking to the highest mountain in Georgia. On day three we had a lovely river front fire pit with marshmallows. Day four we had wine and beer and sang some freestyle blue songs. Christmas day was lovely and we cooked a lovely turkey.
title: Lovely Christmas Trip!
